CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.Name = 'SaaS', IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Closed"), ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Canceled") ), TEXT(SaaS_Override_Reasoning_Stamp__c), IF( NOT(ISPICKVAL(SaaS_Override_Reasoning_Stamp__c, "")), TEXT(SaaS_Override_Reasoning_Stamp__c), TEXT(Combined_Funnel__r.SaaS_Override_Reasoning__c) ) ), '' )
CustomField.label: SaaS Override Reasoning
